assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, and reports (constraint 1.11)

The report and criterion files contain only analysis text and code quotations for verification purposes; no file modification operations are evidenced. The report describes reading and analyzing the diff but never mentions writing to or modifying any source files.

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR — it presents findings for human review (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md concludes with 'Overall: PASS' and a summary of findings but contains no merge action, no gh pr merge command, and no indication of auto-merging. The report presents verdicts and analysis for human review. No output file contains any merge operation.
